title: Spawn Utility
description: Manage multiple spawnpoints on your server.
body:
## **Spawn Utility**
This is a multiple spawn system so that the player can be teleported to different locations when entering the server or force the player to be teleported if he is out of an area, useful for event type servers.

## Requirements
Fabric API - [Download](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## How to install?

- Download Mod and Requirements.
- Place the mod in the Client and Server
- Set at least one spawn.
- Activate the mod


## Commands 

- /spx - This is the main command.
- /spx add <x> <y> <z> - Add a spawn to your current coordinates.
- /spx manualSpawn <@a, @e, player name> - Forces the player to be teleported to the set points of appearance.
- /spx enabled - Activate the mod.
- /spx delete - Delete a spawn.
- /spx reset - Delete all spawn set.

## Mod Authors
Developer
 - SrMaster - [Twitter](https://twitter.com/_SrMaster_)
